claim_boundary.next_gate: Expand O3 to arbitrary local-unitary equivalence or close O1 optimizer completeness; or falsify R15 with a valid equivalent Clifford-frame escape that reaches the pi/4 grid.
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: R15 does not prove general parameterization invariance and does not close O3. NL-C02 is still not a checked negative lemma. No R5 reroute, R1 solution, occurrence removal, proxy-T reduction, B7 credit, resource saving, or impossibility theorem is supported.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: R15 finds no pi/4-grid escape in the declared Clifford-frame affine screen over the R13-bound five-parameter domain.

decision.why: The Clifford-frame affine screen finds no pi/4-grid escape, but O3 remains open because arbitrary local-unitary reparameterization invariance is not proved.

requirements.label: R14 source screen is validation-clean and still leaves O3 open
Exact-decomposition source remains validation-clean with five off-grid parameters
Screen covers the R14 canonical parameter domain
Screen covers both signs, nine Clifford-frame shifts, and five period shifts
All 450 Clifford-frame affine probes are present
No Clifford-frame affine probe reaches the pi/4 grid tolerance
Every parameter has a best-screen row recorded
Screen is hash-bound to R14 and exact-decomposition sources

evidence.why: The Clifford-frame affine screen finds no pi/4-grid escape, but O3 remains open because arbitrary local-unitary reparameterization invariance is not proved.

requirements.label: Screen does not close O3 or upgrade NL-C02
Screen preserves zero resource and B7 credit claims

title: B1/B7 Cone01 R15 NL-C02 Clifford-Frame Affine Screen Gate
